features.description: Upload your file and get processed results in seconds — no waiting in queues.

features.title: Pay Only for What You Use

faqs.q: What can I do with free credits?
faqs.a: You get 5 free credits every month. That's enough to remove 2 backgrounds, convert 5 PDFs, or generate 1 avatar.
Free tier credits reset monthly. Paid plan credits refresh with your billing cycle.
All uploaded files are automatically deleted from our servers after 1 hour. We never store or share your images.

faqs.q: What AI models do you use?
faqs.a: We use industry-leading models via Replicate API, including Stable Diffusion for image generation and GFPGAN for photo restoration.

faqs.q: Can I use the results commercially?
faqs.a: Yes. You retain full ownership of all input and output files. Use them for personal or commercial projects.
We accept PNG, JPG, and WebP for image tools. PDF files up to 20MB for document conversion.

ai-image-generator.name: AI Image Generator
ai-image-generator.description: Turn text into stunning AI images. No watermark, instant download.

avatar-generator.name: AI Avatar Generator
avatar-generator.description: Transform your photos into cartoon, anime, or professional avatars.
howToUse: Upload a clear, front-facing photo with even lighting — avoid shadows, hats, or obstructed faces.
Select one of 6 avatar styles: 3D Cartoon, Anime, Professional, Pixel Art, Watercolor, or Sketch.
Click Generate and the AI creates 4 avatar variations using per-style optimized SDXL prompts.
Download all 4 avatar variations in high resolution for social media, gaming, or professional profiles.

faq.question: What photo works best for avatar generation?
faq.answer: A clear, front-facing portrait with good lighting and a neutral background works best. Avoid group photos, sunglasses, hats, or extreme angles. The AI needs a clear view of your facial features to generate accurate avatars.

faq.question: What styles are available and which should I choose?
faq.answer: 6 styles: 3D Cartoon (Pixar-like, social media), Anime (Japanese animation), Professional (corporate headshot), Pixel Art (retro gaming), Watercolor (artistic painted look), and Sketch (pencil drawing). Each uses a dedicated SDXL prompt tuned for that aesthetic.

faq.question: How many avatar variations do I get?
faq.answer: 4 variations per generation. The AI creates 4 different outputs from the same photo and style so you can pick your favorite. All 4 are included in the 5-credit cost.

faq.question: How many credits does it cost?
faq.answer: 5 credits per generation (includes all 4 variations). This is higher than some tools because avatar generation runs multiple SDXL inferences with optimized per-style prompts for consistent quality.

background-remover.name: Background Remover
background-remover.description: Remove image backgrounds instantly with one click.
howToUse: Upload a photo with unwanted objects, people, text, logos, or blemishes.
Paint a red mask over the areas you want removed — rough strokes work, don't need pixel precision.
Click Remove and the AI (BRIA Eraser inpainting) fills the masked area with context-aware content.
Review the result and download your cleaned-up photo. Re-mask and re-process if needed.

faq.question: What can I remove from my photos?
faq.answer: People, objects, text, logos, blemishes, power lines, date stamps — anything you paint over. The AI fills the area with content that matches the surrounding image using BRIA Eraser inpainting technology.

faq.question: How is this different from Watermark Remover?
faq.answer: Watermark Remover auto-detects watermarks and logos using Florence-2 vision AI — best for text/logos. Object Remover lets you manually paint what to remove — ideal for larger objects, people, and irregular areas. Both use BRIA Eraser for the actual inpainting.

faq.question: How should I paint the mask for best results?
faq.answer: Rough red strokes covering the object work best. Include a small margin around the object. The AI needs some surrounding context to fill naturally. Avoid hairline-precise masking — it's counterproductive.

faq.question: What if the first result isn't perfect?
faq.answer: You can re-process unlimited times within the same session. If the AI fill looks unnatural, try masking a slightly larger area, or break a large object into smaller sections and remove them one at a time.

watermark-remover.name: Watermark Remover
watermark-remover.description: Erase watermarks, logos, and text from images intelligently.
howToUse: Upload an image with watermarks, logos, timestamp stamps, or unwanted text overlays.
Use Auto Detect for the AI to find and remove watermarks automatically, or paint a red mask for manual precision.
For manual mode, paint over the watermark area with the brush tool — rough strokes work best.
Click Remove and download your cleaned image — the AI fills removed areas naturally.

faq.question: Can it remove any watermark?
faq.answer: The AI works best on semi-transparent watermarks, logos, and text overlays. Large opaque watermarks may require manual masking. The tool uses BRIA Eraser inpainting which fills removed areas with context-aware content.

faq.question: What's the difference between Auto Detect and Manual masking?
faq.answer: Auto Detect uses Florence-2 vision AI to find watermarks automatically — best for typical corner/center watermarks. Manual mode gives you full control with a paintbrush for irregular watermarks or when Auto doesn't find them.

faq.question: How should I paint the mask for best results?
faq.answer: Rough strokes over the watermark area work best. Don't worry about pixel-perfect edges — the AI uses surrounding context to fill naturally. Cover the entire watermark plus a small margin around it.

faq.question: How many credits does watermark removal cost?
faq.answer: 3 credits per image. This covers both the detection step (Florence-2 vision model) and the removal step (BRIA Eraser inpainting).

photo-restorer.name: Photo Restorer
photo-restorer.description: Restore and colorize old, blurry, or damaged photos.
howToUse: Upload a black and white photo — old family portraits, historical images, or artistic B&W shots.
Optionally select a color style (Natural, Vibrant, Portrait, Classic) and add a description like 'blue sky, green grass'.
Click Generate and the AI colorizes your photo in 10-20 seconds using FLUX Kontext Pro.
Toggle between Before/After to see the transformation, then download your colorized photo.

faq.question: What types of photos colorize best?
faq.answer: Clear, well-lit black and white photos produce the most accurate results. Portraits, landscapes, and historical photos all colorize well. The AI uses context — skin tones, sky, vegetation — to assign realistic colors.

faq.question: How is this different from Photo Restorer?
faq.answer: Photo Restorer repairs physical damage like scratches, dust, and fading using Topaz AI. Colorizer adds realistic color to B&W photos using FLUX Kontext Pro. Best workflow: restore first to fix damage, then colorize to add life.

faq.question: How do I get the best colorization results?
faq.answer: Choose a style that matches your photo (Natural for everyday, Vibrant for landscapes, Portrait for faces, Classic for vintage). Add an optional text description to guide specific colors — 'navy blue jacket, golden sunset, green trees'.

faq.question: Can it colorize any black and white image?
faq.answer: Yes — vintage family photos, historical images, artistic B&W photography, and even screenshots. The AI understands context (grass should be green, sky should be blue) but you can override with text descriptions for creative effects.

pdf-to-word.name: PDF to Word
pdf-to-word.description: Convert PDF documents to editable Word files instantly.
howToUse: Enter a specific topic — be detailed for better results. Instead of 'marketing', try 'how AI is transforming small business marketing in 2026'.
Optionally add keywords to guide the content focus and select a tone (Neutral, Professional, Casual, etc.).
Set your desired word count (50-5000 words) using the slider or manual input.
Click Generate and the AI writes a structured article with title, introduction, 3-5 main sections, and conclusion.
Review the article, copy to clipboard, or download as a text file for further editing.

faq.question: How do I get the best article results?
faq.answer: Be specific with your topic. Include keywords relevant to your niche. Choose the right tone for your audience — Professional for business, Casual for blog readers, Academic for research. The AI adapts structure and vocabulary based on your inputs.

faq.question: How long are the generated articles?
faq.answer: You control the length — set 50 to 5000 words. The AI generates articles with proper structure at any length: title, compelling introduction, 3-5 main sections with subheadings, and a conclusion with key takeaways.

faq.question: Can I use the generated articles commercially?
faq.answer: Yes. All content you generate belongs to you. Use it on your blog, website, newsletter, social media, or anywhere you need original content. There are no usage restrictions or attribution requirements.

faq.question: How is this different from Text Polish?
faq.answer: Article Generator creates complete, structured articles from a topic and keywords — it's for original content creation. Text Polish refines existing text — fixing grammar, rewriting, shortening, or expanding. Use Article Generator to create drafts, then Text Polish to polish the language.

faq.question: What AI model powers this tool?
faq.answer: Meta Llama 3 70B — one of the most capable open-source language models. It produces coherent, well-structured long-form content with natural human-like writing. The model supports English, Spanish, and Arabic natively.

image-upscaler.name: Image Upscaler
image-upscaler.description: Enhance image resolution with 2x or 4x AI super-resolution.
howToUse: Upload an image you want to enlarge.
Choose Photo or Anime mode for best results.
Select 2x or 4x upscaling factor.
Download your high-resolution image.

faq.question: How much can I upscale an image?
faq.answer: 2x or 4x the original resolution. For best results, start with a reasonably clear image.

style-transfer.name: Image Style Transfer
style-transfer.description: Transform photos into oil paintings, watercolors, anime art.
howToUse: Upload a photo you want to stylize.
Select one of 6 artistic styles.
Click Generate and wait for the style to be applied.
Download your stylized image.

faq.question: What styles are available?
faq.answer: 6 styles: Oil Painting, Watercolor, Sketch, Anime, Cyberpunk, and Vintage.

text-polish.name: Text Polish & Rewrite
text-polish.description: Polish, rewrite, shorten, or expand text with AI.
howToUse: Type or paste up to 2000 characters of text you want to convert to speech.
Select a language for proper pronunciation and natural voice output.
Click Generate and the AI synthesizes the audio — typically 10-15 seconds.
Play the audio preview directly in your browser, then download the MP3 file.

faq.question: What languages are supported for text-to-speech?
faq.answer: 17 languages: English, Spanish, Arabic, French, German, Italian, Japanese, Chinese, Korean, Portuguese, Russian, Turkish, Polish, Dutch, Czech, Hindi, and Hungarian. Powered by MiniMax speech-2.6-turbo for natural-sounding output.

faq.question: How long can the text be?
faq.answer: Up to 2000 characters per generation. For longer texts like articles or scripts, break them into segments of 2000 characters or less and process each separately.

faq.question: What audio format does it produce?
faq.answer: MP3 format — universally compatible with all media players, smartphones, podcast platforms, and video editing software. No special codecs needed.

faq.question: How natural does the AI voice sound?
faq.answer: MiniMax speech-2.6-turbo produces highly natural speech with proper intonation, pacing, and emotion. It's significantly better than older TTS systems — most listeners can't tell it's AI-generated.

faq.question: Can I choose different voices?
faq.answer: Voice selection is currently limited. The tool uses optimized default voices per language for consistent quality. Multi-voice support is on the roadmap for future updates.

face-blur.name: Face Privacy Blur
face-blur.description: Auto-detect faces and blur for privacy.
face-blur.detectHint: AI will scan the image and locate all faces automatically.
face-blur.facesMarkedHint: Faces are marked with green rectangles. Add extra regions if needed, then choose a blur style.
face-blur.noFacesHint: You can still draw regions manually below.
face-blur.drawHint: Click and drag on the image above to add extra blur regions.
howToUse: Upload a photo containing faces you want to obscure — group photos, event shots, or street photography.
The AI (Grounding DINO) automatically detects all faces in the image within seconds.
Choose a blur style: Mosaic (pixelated blocks), Gaussian (smooth blur), Pixelate (color blocks), or Emoji (cute overlays).
Toggle Preview to compare before/after. Add manual blur regions by clicking and dragging for extra coverage.
Click Download to save the processed image as lossless PNG.

faq.question: How does face detection work?
faq.answer: We use Grounding DINO — a state-of-the-art zero-shot object detection model. It detects faces with high accuracy even in group photos, side profiles, and partially obscured faces. The AI runs on GPU for fast processing.

faq.question: Can I manually add blur regions?
faq.answer: Yes. Use the manual selection tool to draw rectangles over any area you want to obscure — faces the AI missed, license plates, logos, or any sensitive content. You can also remove individual regions with Undo or Clear All.

faq.question: What blur styles are available?
faq.answer: Four styles: Mosaic (classic pixelated blocks), Gaussian (smooth lens blur), Pixelate (cell-based color averaging), and Emoji (cute Twemoji face overlays). Each provides different levels of privacy protection and visual appeal.

faq.question: How many credits does it cost?
faq.answer: Standard images (up to 3000px, under 5 faces): 2 credits. High-resolution (>3000px) or 5+ faces: 4 credits. The cost covers both face detection and blur processing.

faq.question: Is this suitable for journalism and privacy compliance?
faq.answer: Yes. Journalists and content creators use this tool to protect identities in photos before publishing. The blur is irreversible — processed faces cannot be unblurred — making it suitable for privacy-sensitive contexts.

text-to-speech.name: AI Text to Speech
text-to-speech.description: Convert text into natural, human-like speech with AI voice synthesis.
howToUse: Type or paste the text you want to convert to speech.
Select a language for proper pronunciation.
Click Generate and wait for the AI to synthesize the audio.
Play the audio preview or download the WAV file.

faq.question: What languages are supported?
faq.answer: 40+ languages including English, Spanish, Arabic, French, German, Italian, Japanese, Chinese, Korean, Portuguese, Russian, Turkish, Polish, Dutch, Czech, Hindi, and Hungarian.

faq.question: How long can the text be?
faq.answer: Up to 2000 characters per generation. For longer texts, break them into smaller segments.

faq.question: What format is the audio?
faq.answer: MP3 format — universal compatibility with all media players, phones, and editing software.

image-description.name: AI Image Describer
image-description.description: Generate detailed image descriptions, alt text, and captions with AI.
howToUse: Upload an image you want to describe.
Optionally add a custom question or instruction for the AI.
Click Generate and the AI will analyze your image.
Get an ALT text for SEO and a detailed description of the image.

faq.question: What does the AI analyze?
faq.answer: Powered by Meta Llama 3.2 Vision — it identifies objects, people, colors, composition, setting, mood, text, and more to generate accurate descriptions.

faq.question: Can I ask specific questions about the image?
faq.answer: Yes! Use the optional prompt field to ask custom questions like 'What brand is the car?' or 'Describe the facial expression.'

faq.question: Is this good for SEO?
faq.answer: Absolutely. The ALT text format is specifically designed for image SEO and accessibility compliance.

colorizer.name: B&W Photo Colorizer
colorizer.description: Bring black and white photos to life with AI colorization.
howToUse: Upload a black and white photo.
Click Generate and watch the AI bring it to life with color.
Toggle between before/after to see the transformation.
Download your colorized photo in high resolution.

faq.question: What types of photos work best?
faq.answer: Clear, well-lit black and white photos produce the best results. Portraits, landscapes, and historical photos all colorize well.

faq.question: How is this different from Photo Restorer?
faq.answer: Photo Restorer repairs damage like scratches and fading. Colorizer uses FLUX Kontext Pro — a state-of-the-art AI that adds realistic color while preserving every detail of the original photo.

faq.question: How do I get the best colorization results?
faq.answer: Choose a style that matches your photo. Add an optional description like 'blue sky, green grass, red car' to guide the AI. More specific descriptions produce more accurate colors.

faq.question: Can it colorize any black and white image?
faq.answer: Yes — old photos, historical images, artistic B&W photos, and even screenshots. The AI understands context to assign plausible colors.

object-remover.name: AI Object Remover
object-remover.description: Remove unwanted objects, people, or text from photos.
howToUse: Upload a photo with unwanted objects, people, or text.
Paint a mask over the areas you want to remove.
Click Remove and the AI will fill the area naturally.
Download your cleaned-up photo.

faq.question: What can I remove?
faq.answer: People, objects, text, logos, blemishes, power lines — anything you paint over. The AI fills the area with context-aware content.

faq.question: How is this different from Watermark Remover?
faq.answer: Watermark Remover auto-detects watermarks and logos. Object Remover lets you manually paint what to remove — ideal for larger or irregular objects.

faq.question: How should I paint the mask?
faq.answer: Rough strokes over the object work best. The AI needs some surrounding context to fill naturally. Avoid pixel-precise masking.

howToUse: Upload a photo you want to transform — portraits, landscapes, and architectural photos work well.
Select one of 6 artistic styles: Oil Painting, Watercolor, Sketch, Cartoon, Cyberpunk, or Fantasy.
Optionally add a text description to fine-tune the style application (e.g., \
Click Generate and wait 10-20 seconds. Download your stylized artwork.

faq.question: What styles are available and what do they look like?
faq.answer: 6 styles: Oil Painting (rich brushstrokes, classical art feel), Watercolor (soft washes, artistic), Sketch (pencil/charcoal drawing), Cartoon (animated style), Cyberpunk (neon-lit futuristic), and Fantasy (ethereal, magical). Each uses IP-Adapter + ControlNet for consistent results.

faq.question: How is this different from the AI Image Generator?
faq.answer: Style Transfer transforms an existing photo by applying an artistic style while preserving the original composition and subject. AI Image Generator creates entirely new images from text prompts. Use Style Transfer when you want to restyle a specific photo.

faq.question: What photos work best for style transfer?
faq.answer: Photos with clear subjects and good contrast produce the best results. Portraits, landscapes, and architectural shots with distinct shapes transfer well. Avoid very dark or low-contrast images — the AI needs visible structure to work with.

faq.question: Can I use a custom style or reference image?
faq.answer: Currently 6 preset styles are available, each optimized for consistent results. The optional text prompt lets you fine-tune colors, mood, and details within the chosen style.

howToUse: Enter a topic for your article — be specific for best results.
Optionally add keywords and select a tone (Neutral, Professional, Casual, etc.).
Click Generate and the AI will write a structured article with title, sections, and conclusion.
Review the article, copy to clipboard, or download as a text file.

faq.question: How do I get the best results?
faq.answer: Be specific with your topic. Instead of 'marketing', try 'how AI is transforming small business marketing in 2026'. Adding relevant keywords helps too.

faq.question: How long are the generated articles?
faq.answer: Articles are typically 500-1500 words with 3-5 main sections. The AI adapts length based on topic complexity.

faq.question: Can I use the articles commercially?
faq.answer: Yes! Content you generate belongs to you. Use it on your blog, website, or anywhere you need content.

about.title: About AI ToolBox Online
about.subtitle: Our mission and story
about.missionText: AI ToolBox Online was built with a simple idea: everyone should have access to powerful AI tools without expensive software subscriptions or technical expertise. Whether you're a small business owner creating professional avatars, a student converting PDFs for assignments, or a designer removing watermarks — our tools are designed to be fast, intuitive, and accessible from any device.
offerItems: Background Remover — One-click background removal for any image
AI Avatar Generator — Transform photos into cartoon, anime, or professional avatars
Watermark Remover — Erase watermarks, logos, and text from images
Photo Restorer — Restore and colorize old, blurry, or damaged photos
PDF to Word — Convert PDF documents to editable Word files
about.howItWorksText: We use industry-leading AI models via Replicate API — including Stable Diffusion for image generation and GFPGAN for photo restoration. All processing happens in the cloud; you just upload your file and get results in seconds. Files are automatically deleted after 1 hour to protect your privacy.
about.pricingText: We believe in transparent, pay-as-you-go pricing. No monthly subscriptions forced on you. Get 5 free credits every month, and only pay when you need more. Every tool shows its credit cost upfront so there are no surprises.
about.contactText: Have questions or feedback? Reach us at jzerov@live.com or visit our contact page.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
contact.emailDesc: For general inquiries, support, or feedback:
contact.responseText: We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24 hours. For urgent matters, please include "URGENT" in your email subject line.

faq.q: How do I get more credits?
faq.a: Visit our Pricing page to purchase credits starting from $4.99 for 50 credits.

faq.q: My file processing failed. What should I do?
faq.a: Please email us with the tool name, file type, and any error message you received. We'll investigate and refund credits if needed.

faq.q: Can I use the outputs commercially?
faq.a: Yes. You retain full ownership of all files you upload and generate through our tools.

sections.title: 1. Who We Are
sections.text: AI ToolBox Online is operated by Liu Jun (individual sole proprietor). Our contact email is jzerov@live.com. We are committed to protecting your privacy and complying with applicable data protection laws including GDPR and CCPA.

sections.title: 2. Information We Collect
sections.text: We collect minimal information necessary to provide our services:
list: Account Information: Email address and name when you create an account.
Usage Data: Tool usage logs for billing and credit management (tool name, timestamp, credits used).
Payment Data: Processed securely by our third-party payment provider (Lemon Squeezy / Stripe). We do not store your payment card details on our servers.

Technical Data: IP address, browser type, and device information collected automatically for security and analytics via Google Analytics (GA4). This data is anonymized and not linked to individual identities.

sections.title: 3. File Handling
sections.text: All uploaded files (images, PDFs) and processed output files are automatically deleted from our servers within 1 hour of processing. We do not store, share, sell, or use your images for training AI models. You retain full ownership of all files you upload and generate through our tools.

sections.title: 4. How We Use Your Information
sections.text: We use your information solely for:
list: Creating and managing your user account.
Processing tool requests and deducting credits.
Processing payments and maintaining billing records.
Communicating with you about your account, service updates, or support requests.
Improving our service performance and user experience.

sections.title: 5. Cookies
sections.text: We use essential cookies to maintain your session locale preference (language selection). We also use Google Analytics (GA4) for anonymized traffic analysis. You can disable cookies in your browser settings, though this may affect site functionality. Third-party services such as payment providers may set their own cookies during checkout.

sections.title: 6. Third-Party Services
sections.text: We use the following third-party services to deliver our platform:
list: Replicate API: For AI image processing. Operates under its own privacy policy.
Lemon Squeezy / Stripe: For secure payment processing. Operates under their own privacy policy.
Cloudflare R2: For temporary file storage during processing. Operates under Cloudflare's privacy policy.
Google Analytics (GA4): For anonymized website traffic analysis. Google does not associate your IP address with any other data.
sections.note: We do not share, sell, or rent your personal data to any third party for marketing purposes.

sections.title: 7. Data Security
sections.text: We use industry-standard encryption (HTTPS/TLS) for all data in transit. Authentication tokens are stored securely in your browser's local storage. Access to backend systems is restricted and protected. We regularly review our security practices.

sections.title: 8. Your Rights (GDPR & CCPA)
sections.text: Under GDPR and CCPA, you have the right to:
list: Access the personal data we hold about you.
Request correction of inaccurate personal data.
Request deletion of your account and all associated personal data.
Object to or restrict certain processing of your data.
Opt out of the sale or sharing of your personal information (we do not sell data).
sections.note: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at jzerov@live.com. We will respond within 30 days.

sections.title: 9. Children's Privacy
sections.text: Our service is not directed to children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we learn that we have collected personal information from a child under 13, we will delete it promptly.

sections.title: 10. Changes to This Policy
sections.text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.

sections.title: 11. Contact
sections.text: For privacy-related inquiries or to exercise your rights, contact us at: Liu Jun — jzerov@live.com.

sections.title: 1. Company Information
sections.text: AI ToolBox Online is operated by Liu Jun (individual sole proprietor). Contact email: jzerov@live.com. By accessing or using our website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

sections.title: 2. Service Description
sections.text: AI ToolBox Online provides AI-powered image processing and document conversion tools, including but not limited to background removal, avatar generation, watermark removal, photo restoration, PDF-to-Word conversion, image upscaling, style transfer, and text polishing. Service availability is subject to third-party API availability. We use a credit-based pricing model where each tool use deducts a set number of credits from your account.

sections.title: 3. Acceptance of Terms
sections.text: By creating an account or using any of our tools, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our services. We may update these terms from time to time; continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

sections.title: 4. User Account & Responsibilities
sections.text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree not to:
list: Share, transfer, or sell your account or credits to another person or entity.
Use our service to process content that violates applicable laws or infringes on others' intellectual property or privacy rights.
Automate, scrape, or access our service via unauthorized means.
Use our service for any unlawful or fraudulent purpose.

sections.title: 5. Credits & Billing
sections.text: All purchases are made in credits via our pricing page. Current packages: 50 credits for $4.99 USD, 100 credits for $9.99 USD, and 500 credits for $24.99 USD. Free accounts receive 5 credits per month. Each tool deducts credits as shown on the tool page (1–5 credits per use). Purchased credits are valid for 12 months from the date of purchase. Free tier credits reset monthly and do not roll over. All prices are in USD.

sections.title: 6. Refund Policy
sections.text: Credits are non-refundable and non-transferable once purchased, except in cases of proven service failure. If a tool fails to process your file due to a technical error on our side, contact us at jzerov@live.com with the tool name, file type, and error details. We will investigate and refund the deducted credits to your account if the issue was caused by our service. Refund requests are processed within 5 business days. We do not offer cash refunds — refunded credits are added back to your account balance.

sections.title: 7. Intellectual Property
sections.text: The AI ToolBox Online platform, including its design, code, branding, and logo, is protected by intellectual property rights owned by Liu Jun. You retain full ownership of all files you upload and all outputs generated through our tools. You may use outputs for personal or commercial purposes.

sections.title: 8. Privacy & Data Handling
sections.text: All uploaded files and processed outputs are automatically deleted from our servers within 1 hour of processing. We collect minimal personal data (email address, name) for account management. Payment data is processed securely by our third-party payment provider. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes. See our Privacy Policy for full details.

sections.title: 9. Disclaimer of Warranties
sections.text: AI ToolBox Online is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not guarantee uninterrupted, error-free, or timely service. AI-generated outputs may vary in quality and accuracy. You use the service at your own risk.

sections.title: 10. Limitation of Liability
sections.text: To the maximum extent permitted by law, AI ToolBox Online and its operator shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of or inability to use our services, including but not limited to loss of data, files, or profits.

sections.title: 11. Third-Party Services
sections.text: We use third-party services including Replicate (AI processing), Stripe/Lemon Squeezy (payment processing), and Cloudflare R2 (temporary storage). Each operates under its own terms and privacy policy. We are not responsible for the actions of these third-party services.

sections.title: 12. Governing Law
sections.text: These terms are governed by applicable law. Any disputes shall be resolved through good-faith negotiation. If resolution is not possible, disputes may be brought before the appropriate courts.

sections.title: 13. Contact Information
sections.text: For any questions regarding these terms, contact us at: Liu Jun — jzerov@live.com. We aim to respond within 24–48 hours.

aiImageGenerator.title: AI Image Generator
aiImageGenerator.description: Describe it. See it. Download it. Turn any text prompt into a stunning AI-generated image — no watermark, instant delivery, pay only for what you create!
aiImageGenerator.promptPlaceholder: A majestic mountain landscape at golden hour, with a crystal-clear lake reflecting the peaks...
aiImageGenerator.referenceDesc: Upload a photo to guide style & composition. Adds 1 extra credit.
aiImageGenerator.noImages: The AI couldn't generate images. Try a different prompt or settings.

tips.text: Be specific! "A fluffy orange cat sleeping on a windowsill at sunset" beats "cat" every time.
Low quality is great for quick drafts & brainstorming. High quality uses more steps for finer detail.
Upload a reference image to guide composition. The AI blends your photo with the text description.
Generate multiple images at once to compare variations. Each extra image costs just 1 more credit.

pdfToWord.title: PDF to Word
pdfToWord.description: Unlock your PDFs! Text or scanned — convert any PDF into a squeaky-clean editable Word doc.
pdfToWord.downloadText: Your Word document is ready for download.

imageUpscaler.title: Image Upscaler
imageUpscaler.description: Zoom and enhance! Turn tiny, blurry pics into crisp, detailed images.
imageUpscaler.uploadToSee: Select options and upscale to see result

photo.label: Photo
photo.desc: General model + face enhancement for portraits

anime.label: Anime / Illustration
anime.desc: Optimized for line art, animation, and illustrations

tips.text: Low-res pics get the glow-up! Best for images under 2000px — already crisp photos won't see much change.
Keep files under 1MB / 2000px. Bigger images can overwhelm the AI — even robots have limits!
Portraits? Photo mode adds face magic. Illustrations or anime? Anime mode keeps those lines crisp!
2× is your go-to hero. 4× works best on tiny images under 1000px — go big or go home!

styleTransfer.title: Image Style Transfer
styleTransfer.description: Paint your photo into a masterpiece — oil, sketch, cyberpunk, fantasy & more!
styleTransfer.uploadToSee: Select a style and transform to see result

oil-painting.label: Oil Painting
oil-painting.desc: Thick brush strokes, rich warm palette

tips.text: Solo subject, stunning result! Single portraits work best — busy backgrounds can confuse our AI artist.
We'll square-crop your photo auto-magically. Centered composition = perfect style makeover!
No settings, no stress! Every style has its secret sauce pre-tuned for consistent awesomeness.
Bright lighting, clear face, centered frame = style magic. Our AI paints best from a great photo!
